10511858.title: Once Upon A Time in Punchbowl
10511858.description: The Lebanese Civil War forces around 30,000 Muslims and Christians to flee their homeland and join an exodus to Australia to start new lives.

10657063.title: Once Upon A Time in Punchbowl
10657063.description: By the late 1990's the Lebanese Australian community was being terrorised by a violent criminal minority enforcing the drug racket with extreme violence.

10657448.title: Once Upon A Time in Punchbowl
10657448.description: After 9/11 many in the Lebanese-Australian community feel their loyalty is being unfairly questioned. Many feel accused of being a terrorist enemy within.
